title: Xue Yue
content:
Xue Yue
 is covered by ice and snow and their cultivation is often related to that as well. So whenever Xue Yue attacks another country, they use one-way rifts to cover the country with snow first and then attack.
[
1
]

Located east from the 
Sea of Devils
 and located right above the Four Sect Alliance Union (四派联盟).

They invaded the land of the Four Sect Alliance Union using the rain cauldron artifact as an excuse.
[
2
]
